headline: Dow Jones Futures: After Strong Week, Look For This Bullish Market Signal
summary: Futures fell as the March jobs report was much stronger than expected. Look for this stock market signal. Tesla tumbled Thursday.

headline: AI, Robotics Keep Teradyne Shares in Demand
summary: Shares of Teradyne, Inc. (TER) gained 3,163% since last first outlier inflow signal in March 1995.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall With Jobs Report Due; Stock Market Hasn't Done This Yet
summary: The stock market rose strongly for the week, even with oil prices soaring. Investors should look for this signal. Tesla tumbled Thursday on weak deliveries.
